title: Add port range (0-65535), length consistency, checksum=0, and source validation to UdpDatagram.from_bytes
description: Update python/src/lichen/ipv6/udp.py to raise UdpError on invalid ports, inconsistent length field (per RFC 768), checksum==0 for IPv6 (RFC 8200 8.1), and malformed source if provided. Align with ICMPv6Message.from_bytes style.
